base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_1_3_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Tree-tops / sky-platform section — Overworld-tree-palette. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Tree-tops / sky-platform section — Overworld-tree-palette; Mario jumps from floating platforms over gaps to reach flagpole. Introduces flying-Koopas.
